Home›Services› Hybrid MDR Services
Co-Managed Detection & Response

Hybrid MDR —
Your Team, Amplified
24/7

Hybrid Managed Detection and Response bridges the gap between a fully outsourced MDR and an in-house SOC. We layer our expert analysts and threat intelligence on top of your existing infrastructure — covering the gaps, extending your hours, and escalating only high-fidelity alerts your team needs to act on.

Co-Managed SOC24/7 Threat MonitoringEDR ManagementNDR AnalysisXDR IntegrationThreat HuntingIncident ResponseSIEM Co-ManagementAlert Triage
Schedule MDR Consultation Request MDR Capabilities Brief
Coverage Guarantee
24/7
Continuous threat monitoring by human analysts — not just automated rules
  • Alert triage and false positive suppression
  • Threat hunting on emerging adversary TTPs
  • Escalation only when human action required
  • Monthly threat briefing with your team
  • Incident response on activation within 1 hour
Model Comparison

Is Hybrid MDR Right for You?

In-House SOC Only
Internal Team
You own the tools and staff. Full control, but coverage gaps and talent retention are constant challenges.
  • Complete visibility and control
  • Expensive to staff 24/7
  • High analyst attrition risk
  • Coverage gaps on nights/weekends
  • No external threat intelligence
Recommended
Hybrid MDR
Your internal team handles strategy and context. We handle coverage, triage, hunting, and response — together.
  • Preserves your team's context
  • True 24/7/365 analyst coverage
  • Shared tool ownership
  • Proactive threat hunting included
  • Faster IR activation on incidents
Fully Outsourced MDR
Pure MDR
Fully outsourced monitoring and response. Good for organizations with no internal security team.
  • Low internal overhead
  • 24/7 coverage included
  • Limited knowledge transfer
  • Less customization per environment
  • Internal team sidelined
Hybrid MDR Capabilities

What Our Analysts
Deliver Each Day

Every Hybrid MDR engagement is staffed by experienced analysts — not junior-level tier-1 teams reading runbooks. We triage, investigate, hunt, and respond alongside your internal security resources.

i.

24/7 Threat Monitoring & Alert Triage

Our analysts monitor your SIEM, EDR, NDR, and cloud environment around the clock. Every alert is reviewed by a human — not just auto-closed by a rule. We suppresS false positives, contextualize true positives, and escalate only when your team needs to take action.

SIEMEDRCloud MonitoringAlert Fatigue Reduction
ii.

Endpoint Detection & Response (EDR) Co-Management

We co-manage your EDR platform — tuning detection policies, investigating behavioral alerts, isolating compromised endpoints, and providing detailed forensic context on every confirmed incident. EDR expertise across CrowdStrike, SentinelOne, Microsoft Defender, and Palo Alto Cortex.

CrowdStrikeSentinelOneDefender XDRCortex XDR
iii.

Network Detection & Response (NDR)

Network-level visibility catches attackers that endpoint tools miss — lateral movement, C2 communication, data staging, and protocol abuse. We integrate NDR into your monitoring stack and provide human analysis on every significant network anomaly.

NDRNetwork AnomalyLateral MovementC2 Detection
iv.

Proactive Threat Hunting

We don't wait for alerts to fire. Our threat hunters proactively search your environment for indicators of compromise, attacker persistence mechanisms, and pre-ransomware staging activity — using hypothesis-driven hunting frameworks aligned to MITRE ATT&CK.

MITRE ATT&CKHypothesis-DrivenPre-RansomwarePersistence Detection
v.

Incident Response Integration

When a confirmed incident is identified, our MDR analysts initiate response activities within 60 minutes — containment, forensic preservation, and root cause analysis. We work alongside your team or the incident can be handed off to our dedicated DFIR practice for full investigation.

60-Min SLAContainmentForensic PreservationRoot Cause Analysis
vi.

Threat Intelligence & Monthly Briefings

Your team receives monthly threat intelligence briefings tailored to your industry, technology stack, and observed threat actor activity. We also deliver curated IOC feeds, MITRE ATT&CK coverage reports, and trend analysis covering the specific adversaries targeting your sector.

Threat IntelIOC FeedsMonthly BriefingATT&CK Coverage
Technology Integration

We Work with
What You Have

Hybrid MDR doesn't require a rip-and-replace of your existing security stack. We integrate with your current tools — your SIEM, EDR, cloud platforms, identity providers, and network appliances — and extend their value with expert human oversight.

Discuss Your Stack
SIEM / Log Management
  • Microsoft Sentinel
  • Splunk ES
  • Google Chronicle
  • Elastic SIEM
  • IBM QRadar
EDR / XDR Platforms
  • CrowdStrike Falcon
  • SentinelOne
  • Defender XDR
  • Palo Alto Cortex
  • Carbon Black
Cloud Environments
  • Microsoft Azure / M365
  • AWS Security Hub
  • Google Cloud Security
  • Cloudflare
  • Okta / Azure AD
Network / NDR
  • Darktrace
  • ExtraHop Reveal(x)
  • Corelight
  • Palo Alto NGFW
  • Zeek / Suricata
Who Benefits Most

Hybrid MDR Use Cases

Hybrid MDR is specifically designed for organizations that have invested in security tools and internal staff — but face coverage gaps, burnout, or skill limitations in advanced threat detection.

🏢

Mid-Market Enterprises

Organizations with 500–5,000 employees that have a small security team and existing tooling but cannot staff a full 24/7 SOC internally.

🏛️

Defense Contractors (DIB)

DoD contractors requiring CMMC-aligned continuous monitoring and incident response capabilities that satisfy DFARS cyber reporting obligations.

🏥

Healthcare & Life Sciences

HIPAA-regulated organizations needing 24/7 monitoring of EHR environments, medical devices, and cloud workloads with incident response integration.

⚖️

Legal & Professional Services

Law firms and professional services firms handling sensitive client data that need continuous monitoring without building an internal SOC from scratch.

💰

Financial Services

Regulated financial institutions requiring SOC 2 Type II-aligned monitoring, threat hunting, and rapid incident response to satisfy auditor and regulator expectations.

🔬

Critical Infrastructure

Utilities, manufacturing, and critical infrastructure operators needing OT/IT security monitoring and incident detection across converged environments.

Get Started

Extend Your Team with
Expert MDR Coverage

The first step is a no-obligation MDR readiness discussion — we'll evaluate your current tooling, coverage gaps, and threat exposure to determine the right Hybrid MDR model for your organization.

Schedule MDR Consultation Call 301-352-4855
No lock-in contracts · Integrates with your existing tools · U.S.-based analysts
